un.caen.model.items

Class Bomb

  • java.lang.Object
    • un.caen.model.items.Item
      • un.caen.model.items.Weapon
        • un.caen.model.items.Bomb

  • public class Bomb
extends Weapon
    Represents a bomb item in the game, which can be placed by players. The bomb has a countdown timer and visibility settings based on the owner.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class un.caen.model.items.Weapon

        damage, ownerPlayerId, range

      • Fields inherited from class un.caen.model.items.Item

        id, ItemCount, position, visible

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Bomb(int countdown, int ownerPlayerId, boolean visibleToAll)
      Constructs a Bomb with the specified countdown, owner player ID, and visibility setting.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getOwnerPlayerId()
      Gets the ID of the player who placed the bomb.
      boolean isVisibleToPlayer(int playerId)
      Checks if the bomb is visible to a specific player.
      int tick()
      Returns the countdown time for the bomb in milliseconds.
      void use(Direction direction)
      Uses the bomb in a specified direction (not implemented).
      void use(int x, int y)
      Uses the bomb at a specified position (not implemented).

      • Methods inherited from class un.caen.model.items.Weapon

        apply, getDamage, getRange

    • Constructor Detail

      • Bomb

        public Bomb(int countdown,
            int ownerPlayerId,
            boolean visibleToAll)
        Constructs a Bomb with the specified countdown, owner player ID, and visibility setting.
        Parameters:
        countdown - the countdown duration for the bomb (in seconds)
        ownerPlayerId - the ID of the player who placed the bomb
        visibleToAll - true if the bomb is visible to all players, false otherwise

    • Method Detail

      • isVisibleToPlayer

        public boolean isVisibleToPlayer(int playerId)
        Checks if the bomb is visible to a specific player.
        Parameters:
        playerId - the ID of the player to check visibility for
        Returns:
        true if the bomb is visible to the player, false otherwise

      • getOwnerPlayerId

        public int getOwnerPlayerId()
        Gets the ID of the player who placed the bomb.
        Returns:
        the owner player ID

      • tick

        public int tick()
        Returns the countdown time for the bomb in milliseconds.
        Returns:
        the countdown time in milliseconds

      • use

        public void use(int x,
                int y)
        Uses the bomb at a specified position (not implemented).
        Specified by:
        use in class Weapon
        Parameters:
        x - the x-coordinate where the bomb is used
        y - the y-coordinate where the bomb is used

      • use

        public void use(Direction direction)
        Uses the bomb in a specified direction (not implemented).
        Specified by:
        use in class Weapon
        Parameters:
        direction - the Direction in which the bomb is used
